query:
SELECT p.torrent_id, p.seeder
                FROM peers p
                WHERE p.user_id = $2 AND p.active = true
                AND p.torrent_id IN (
                    SELECT t.id FROM torrents t
                    JOIN edition_groups eg ON eg.id = t.edition_group_id
                    WHERE eg.title_group_id = $1 AND t.deleted_at IS NULL
                )
